message.content:
The services section is not visible in the provided screenshot. The image shows the homepage of Astra Studio with navigation, hero section, client logos, and statistics, but the services section content (gradient banners, service cards, tool tags, or two-column layout) is not displayed. 

To properly evaluate the services section as requested, I would need to see the actual services page or section that contains the gradient banners on service cards, two-column service listing, and tool tag badges.

If you can provide the services section screenshot or describe its content, I'd be happy to give a detailed evaluation of:
- Visual appeal of gradient banners on service cards (1-10 rating)
- Clarity of the two-column service listing
- Effectiveness of tool tag badges
- Any issues or suggestions for improvement

Without seeing the services section content, I cannot provide the specific evaluation you're looking for.
